name: I'm on a Trampoline
hints: You're bouncing on the trampoline! This is fun but not very productive.
JUMP to bounce. GET OFF or GET DOWN to get off the trampoline.
The trampoline is more useful as a portable item. GET OFF and take it with you.
GET DOWN to stop bouncing. You need the trampoline at the top of the ride to reach the catwalk.
notes: On the trampoline. JUMP bounces, GET OFF/GET DOWN dismounts. The trampoline is better used as a portable item to reach the catwalk.
